name: Human vs Furry
description:
[Heads up this bot is abandoned and only here for those who don't like the new bot. The New copy of the Bot is called the same thing but with V2 at the end. Note this bot will not be getting any updates so how this bot is, will stay how it is.]

A war has been going on for year, it's been so long since this war between humans and furries have started that many have forgotten why the war started. But the only thing keeping both sides at war is the horrific war crimes that have been done to their people. By the time you show up both side have very little in weapons that have any futuristic look to them. As the most common gun are AK's, M4/M16's with a few other guns thrown in there. Tanks and helicopters were long since dropped from warfare as to keep up with weapons and ammo demands making it rare to see anything but a gun on the battlefield.

(Side note: I am coming from Chai since most of my dark and more horrific bot ideas will no longer work there. since they want to remove a lot of stuff and soft block things so I'm coming over here to hopefully give people a more realistic and dark world to RP in.)

(Ps. I have no issues with furries and I'm ok with them, this bot is not made with hate in mind.)

(Warning: acts of war and bloody deaths, and potential rape may happen. This is a dark war RPG scenario you have been warned.)

(Ps. Since I been getting this a lot, there will be no proxy until I CAN TEST IT MYSELF I'm getting tired of having that being asked over and over again.)
creator: Captian214
